tools.name: git_changed_files_with_diffs
tools.description: Changed files with full per-file diffs. New untracked files show full content via --no-index.
args:
set -u; dl=${LEATHER_GIT_DIFF_LINES:-300}; git_status=$(git status --porcelain --untracked-files=all); if [ -z "$git_status" ]; then printf 'no changes
'; exit 0; fi; total=$(printf '%s
' "$git_status" | wc -l | tr -d ' '); printf 'TOTAL: %s files to commit
' "$total"; printf '%s
' "$git_status" | while IFS= read -r line; do code=${line:0:2}; f=${line:3}; case "$f" in *' -> '*) f=${f##* -> };; esac; printf '
===== FILE: %s STATUS: %s =====
' "$f" "$code"; is_new=0; if git ls-files --others --exclude-standard -- "$f" | grep -qxF "$f"; then is_new=1; fi; if [ "$is_new" = '1' ]; then printf '%s
' '-- new file (untracked) --'; git diff --no-index -- /dev/null "$f" 2>/dev/null | head -n "$dl" || true; else staged=$(git diff --cached -- "$f" 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$staged" ]; then printf '%s
' '-- staged --'; printf '%s
' "$staged" | head -n "$dl"; else printf '%s
' '-- staged -- (none)'; fi; unstaged=$(git diff -- "$f" 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$unstaged" ]; then printf '%s
' '-- unstaged --'; printf '%s
' "$unstaged" | head -n "$dl"; fi; fi; done

tools.name: git_file_diff
tools.description: Full diff or content for one file — staged, unstaged, or new untracked. Use when git_changed_files_with_diffs truncated a file. Requires: file.
args:
set -u; f=$1; dl=${LEATHER_GIT_FILE_DIFF_LINES:-200}; printf 'FILE: %s

' "$f"; if git ls-files --others --exclude-standard -- "$f" | grep -qxF "$f"; then printf '%s
' '-- new file (untracked) --'; git diff --no-index -- /dev/null "$f" 2>/dev/null | head -n "$dl" || true; else staged=$(git diff --cached -- "$f" 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$staged" ]; then printf '%s
' '-- staged --'; printf '%s
' "$staged" | head -n "$dl"; else printf '%s
' '-- staged -- (none)'; fi; unstaged=$(git diff -- "$f" 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$unstaged" ]; then printf '%s

' '-- unstaged --'; printf '%s
' "$unstaged" | head -n "$dl"; fi; fi

tools.name: git_enqueue_file_commit
tools.description: Enqueue one per-file commit task via the caller's intake endpoint. Requires: file, message, signing_key.
args:
set -eu; f=$1; msg=$2; key=$3; tmp=$(mktemp); trap 'rm -f "$tmp"' EXIT; chmod 600 "$tmp"; printf 'FILE: %s
MESSAGE: %s
SIGNING_KEY: %s
' "$f" "$msg" "$key" > "$tmp"; curl -sf -X POST "${LEATHER_INTAKE_URL}?kind=cli.git.file_commit&curing=cli-git-commit-file&queue=cli-git-commit-file-in" --data-binary @"$tmp"

tools.name: git_commit_file_signed
tools.description: Stage and GPG-sign commit exactly one file. Requires: file, message, signing_key.
args: set -u; f=$1; msg=$2; key=$3; lock="$(git rev-parse --git-dir)/leather-commit.lock"; exec 9>"$lock"; flock 9; git add -- "$f" && git commit -m "$msg" --gpg-sign="$key" -- "$f"
